title: Coleman 2-Person Dome Tent — Waterproof & Quick Setup
short_description: Durable dome tent for 2 people. Waterproof up to 3000 mm, easy setup in minutes. Ideal for weekend camping.
long_description: The Coleman dome tent accommodates two people and is the perfect companion for weekend getaways. Its waterproof outer layer keeps you reliably dry even in heavy rain. The tent features color-coded poles for quick and easy setup. Includes a carry bag for convenient transport.
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who value practical features in tents: 2-person capacity, waterproof 3000 mm, quick setup system.
